ground_truth.title: California HR Outsourcing - Emplicity PEO & HR Outsourcing
ground_truth.main_content: Emplicity helps California Small Businesses Reduce HR Costs, Minimize Risk, and Increase Productivity. As California's leading local HR Services Provider, Emplicity is the simple choice for employers with up to 250 employees. Full-Service HR for Your Small Business includes: Human Resources - We limit costs and minimize employer-related risk while supporting your most critical employee decisions and responsibilities. Compliance - Support with governmental regulations and reporting requirements, minimizing your exposure to liability. Payroll - From basics like cutting paychecks and distributing W2's to complex matters like tracking wage garnishments and creating customized reports. Workers' Compensation - Our occupational Claims Management system is customized to fit your company's unique needs. Benefits - We alleviate the hassle of managing a top-notch benefits package so that you can focus on your business. Technology - Our Human Resources Information System (HRIS) keeps your team productive and allows you to focus on your business. Training and Safety - Inspection, training, investigation and general guidance is provided at the highest level to promote a safe and productive work environment. Online Education - Self-paced learning for employees or mandatory tracks based on your company requirements all with easy to use setup and monitoring. Recruiting - We create compelling employment propositions that resonate with top candidates whose professional motivations align with yours. Emplicity serves over 8500 worksite employees with a service team that averages 12.6 years experience. Established in 1995, Emplicity has been helping businesses with the complexities of HR management for 25 years as a privately held company focused on the local business wanting personal service.
with: Emplicity helps California Small Businesses Reduce HR Costs, Minimize Risk, and Increase Productivity.
As California's leading local HR Services Provider, Emplicity is the simple choice for employers with up to 250 employees.
We limit costs and minimize employer-related risk while supporting your critical employee decisions and responsibilities.
Emplicity serves over 8500 worksite employees with a service team that averages 12.6 years experience.
Emplicity is a one stop service for us. They have specialists in HR, in payroll and in benefits, and they all have knowledge that is up-to-date.
